one_liner: Attio is a modern CRM offering a broad, self-serve REST API (OAuth2 or API key auth) and an official hosted MCP server, making it readily buildable for AI-agent tooling today.

auth_methods.notes: Standard OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow recommended for multi-workspace apps; authorize/token/introspect endpoints documented.
Single-workspace API key generated in developer settings, used as Bearer token; suitable for single-workspace integrations.
HTTP Basic Authentication supported (token as username, blank password) but not recommended over Bearer.

self_serve_notes: Free tier signup with no credit card required includes API access (rate-limited). API keys can be self-generated in developer settings; OAuth apps can be registered via the developer dashboard (build.attio.com).

api_surface.notes: Full REST API covering records (people, companies, deals), lists, tasks, notes, webhooks, plus an App SDK for building apps on the platform.

evidence.supports: Details OAuth2, API key, and Basic auth methods with Bearer token usage
Developer platform with self-serve free tier and API access
Confirms self-serve free tier without credit card including API access

flags: Official hosted MCP server exists at mcp.attio.com using OAuth; community-maintained self-hosted alternative (attio-mcp npm package) also available using API key
